I couldn't find any store with that exact name, but there are a few Amazon warehouses and lockers in Madrid. Here are a few:

* amazon outlet at C. del Trueno, 28, 28918 Leganés, Madrid, Spain
* [Amazon Locker - camila](https://www.amazon.es/ulp/add-ap-to-address-book?countryCode=ES&accessPointId=d0a495f6-4a04-4656-b93a-9de6f756ed65&ref_=hubm_es_gm_lkr_d0a495f6-4a04-4656-b93a-9de6f756ed65) at Moraleja Green CC - Madrid, Av. de Europa, 13-15, 28108 Alcobendas, Madrid, Spain
* [Amazon Locker - guadaira](https://www.amazon.es/ulp/add-ap-to-address-book?countryCode=ES&accessPointId=34783272&ref_=hubm_es_gm_lkr_34783272) at Ahorramas, C. del Dr. Esquerdo, 20, 28028 Madrid, Spain
* [Amazon Counter](https://www.amazon.es/ulp/add-ap-to-address-book?countryCode=ES&accessPointId=d1756866-c4fe-4ff1-98d5-357298c9a185&ref_=hubm_es_gm_coutr_d1756866-c4fe-4ff1-98d5-357298c9a185) at C. de las Maldonadas, 7, 28005 Madrid, Spain
* [Amazon Counter](https://www.amazon.es/ulp/add-ap-to-address-book?countryCode=ES&accessPointId=93c85201-8a87-486d-a68a-065a8f0b8b0a&ref_=hubm_es_gm_coutr_93c85201-8a87-486d-a68a-065a8f0b8b0a) at C. de Palos de la Frontera, 25, 28045 Madrid, Spain

Let me know if you have any other questions.
